title: kkg manifest response
description: Self-describing command registry so agents can discover kkg capabilities.

envelope_schema.description: Filename of the envelope schema that all responses satisfy.

name.description: CLI command name as registered in Typer.

schema.description: Filename in schemas/ for the command's response, or null.

project_aware.description: True if the command accepts --project and routes to a per-project store.

touches_graph_store.description: True if the command opens a connection to the active graph store (FalkorDB Lite by default; KuzuDB or Neo4j when selected explicitly).

server.description: True if the command starts a long-running process.

prereqs.description: Environment variables or services required at runtime (e.g. FALKORDB_PATH, HF_HOME). The backend-path variable reflects the default backend (FalkorDB Lite); invoke with --database kuzudb to use KUZUDB_PATH instead.
